name: Strawberry and Rhubarb Jam
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rhubarb, fresh or frozen, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, hull, and drain the strawberries. Measure out slightly crushed berries.
2. Cut the unpeeled orange into quarters and remove seeds. Chop or finely grind the orange.
3. Mix all ingredients in a large heavy-bottomed saucepan.
4. Bring to a boil over high heat, stirring frequently until thickened (12-15 minutes).
5. Remove from heat, skim off foam, and stir for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Ladle into hot sterilized jars and seal.
